chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُسْلِمِ يَقْتُلُ الذِّمِّيَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الذِّمِّيِّ يَقْتُلُ الْمُسْلِمَ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ أَوْ يَقْتَصُّ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضاً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – The Muslim kills the Zimmy or injures him, and the Zimmy kills the Muslim or injures him, or they retaliate against each other

text: رَجُلٍ مُسْلِمٍ قَتَلَ رَجُلًا مِنْ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ فَقَالَ هَذَا حَدِيثٌ شَدِيدٌ لَا يَحْتَمِلُهُ النَّاسُ وَ لَكِنْ يُعْطِي الذِّمِّيُّ دِيَةَ الْمُسْلِمِ ثُمَّ يُقْتَلُ بِهِ الْمُسْلِمُ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Zurara, from Sama’at,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding a Muslim man who kills a man from the Zimmy people. So heasws said: ‘This is a harsh Hadeeth, the people cannot bear it, but the Zimmy has to give the wergild of the Muslim, then the Muslim would be killed due to it’.
